title: Jammies-TFC
description: Jammies is a addon for TerraFirmaCraft that reworks jams and jars
body:
# 🍏 Jammies

Jammies is an addon for **TerraFirmaCraft** that reworks how jams behave.
It introduces reusable jar lids. 

### Features & Changes:

- Jars now return the lid when opened based on the return chance.
- Jars display the lid and return chance on the tooltip.
- Jars can be resealed to extend their shelf life.
- Jars can be opened using rightclick.

### Current Lids and return chances: 

- Tin Lid (TFC's existing Jar Lid) - 75% Return Chance 
- Stainless Steel Lid (if Firmalife is installed) - 100% Return Chance

### Compats:

- Patchouli - Info related to Jams and Jarring has been updated on the ingame patchouli guide
- EMI/JEI - Recipe viewers will show the lid(s) in the crafting grid to indicate the return chance

### Customization:

- You can easily add your own lids or edit the existing ones using a datapack. You can find detailed information and example on the [Wiki](https://github.com/Lxshhr/Jammies-TFC/wiki)
